issues.detail: ledger.jsonl has 10 entries only. Originally expected 600+. Scheduler log confirms runs at every 15:00/15:30/16:00/16:30/17:00/17:30/18:00/18:30 slot. Entries written by scheduler but not in ledger. Possible rotation by post_mortem+compaction combo or batch overwrite. Data integrity is compromised. Missing ~15h of historical KPI signal across 12 continuity checks.
issues.mitigation: ledger_recovered.jsonl (121KB, pre-May 11) exists but is pre-existing recovery file, not todays data. May11-May17 continuity history lost. Need agent-level write to examine post_mortem.js and any run batch that modified ledger.jsonl.

issues.detail: 4h gap scan (19:30 UTC): 7/9 slots missing [15:30-18:30]. Scheduler log confirms it ran at every slot successfully — entries exist in log but NOT in ledger. Root cause is same as ledger truncation. System intermittency is ILLUSORY (scheduler ran fine) but gap detector sees missing entries.
issues.mitigation: Fix root ledger corruption; do NOT add synthetic gap_repair entries to cover these slots without confirming actual runs — scheduler log is the safety-net.

issues.detail: Missions short: 1/12 not published. Mission missing from today's cron execution. Known recurring issue from days 4-6.
